calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Respondent/Plaintiff Alejandra Martinez is also present.
Nephtali Gonzales, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant Marcos Ulises Davila Gonzalez.

The cause comes on regularly for a Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed.

Nephtali Gonzales testifies on behalf of Marcos Ulises Davila Gonzalez Appellant/Defendant. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Group Exhibit A: Acknowledgment of Re-Assignment of Judgments, 3 Pages dated 3-5-2014, 4-30-2010, 8-18-2010.

Mr. Gonzales, Counsel for Marcos Ulises Davila Gonzalez presents arguments to the Court on the untimely service of the Motion to Vacate and requests a continuance. Arguments having been submitted, the request for continuance is DENIED. The Motion to Vacate Judgment will be taken under submission.

Respondent/Plaintiff Alejandra Martinez, testifies on her own behalf. At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (525)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2017 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Judgment Entered
